step: Read Task 002/007/014 artifacts and adopted their outputs as direct inputs: protocol schemas in packages/cockpit-protocol, projection APIs in packages/pm and apps/web/src/lib/cockpit/projector.ts, and private cockpit UI components/pages under apps/web/src/components/cockpit and apps/web/src/app/cockpit; noted Task 001 guidance to keep archive scanning on-demand and avoid mixing demo data into private tables

Planned isolated demo implementation: synthetic validated events in apps/web/src/lib/cockpit/demo.ts, public /demo/cockpit pages that never touch the cockpit repository, and minimal route-base props for shared cockpit components so private links are not reused on public pages

Implemented demo-only cockpit data generation in apps/web/src/lib/cockpit/demo.ts using validated @cleandev/cockpit-protocol events folded through @cleandev/pm projection, and added public /demo/cockpit overview/detail routes with auto-refresh plus shared cockpit component route-base props to avoid linking into private pages
Verified demo mode with targeted web checks: demo + shared cockpit component tests passed (27 tests across 4 files) and pnpm --filter @cleandev/web exec tsc --noEmit completed cleanly
